title: Sweetwater Music Center Scheduler Revamp
description: Led the full-stack re-engineering of the official room scheduling platform for the Purdue University Music Department, streamlining facility booking workflows for an active user base of 200+ students and faculty. Resolved critical data consistency anomalies and race conditions by implementing optimistic concurrency control and rigorous error handling, maintaining 100% data integrity and eliminating double-bookings during peak enrollment periods.

title: DonsEats: On-Campus Food Ordering System
description: Architected an event-driven serverless platform designed to scale for a campus body of 5,000+ students, validating system stability under high-concurrency scenarios using Locust load testing frameworks. Optimized backend performance by decoupling order ingestion from notification services, achieving sub-200ms response times while handling 500+ requests per second during peak load simulations.

title: Chest X-ray Disease Classification Using Convolutional Neural Networks
description: Solved the challenge of multi-label classification on imbalanced chest X-ray datasets by leveraging an ensemble of CNN models fine-tuned with Optuna hyperparameter optimization, achieving a 25% accuracy improvement and real-time inference on AWS SageMaker. Improved clinical trust through Grad-CAM visualizations, providing interpretable diagnostic insights while enabling rapid, reliable disease detection for healthcare applications.

title: PFW Question Answering System
description: Engineered a multi-transformer ensemble combining BERT, RoBERTa, and XLNet, fine-tuned on a large domain-specific FAQ dataset, boosting question understanding accuracy to 92 F1-score and 88% exact match, addressing complex query interpretation challenges. Enhanced system responsiveness through quantization and asynchronous batching, delivering responses in under 150 milliseconds, fully integrated into the university portal to improve student engagement and support efficiency.

title: QuestSpot: Docode the clues, decode the world
description: This project was designed to advance cross-platform development skills by building a multi-language Flutter-Firebase scavenger hunt app. Integrated Gemini AI to generate location-based clues, offering features like difficulty levels, game-sharing, bonus point analysis, heatmaps, and dark/light themes for Android and iOS.
